title: Crumbly Peppery Slovakian Pinto Bean Crumble
description: This adventurous plant-based dish features pinto beans marinated in a peppery sauce for an added depth of flavor, topped with a crumbly crust.

ingredients.name: Salt to taste
ingredients.notes: to season the marinade and crumble

instructions: Soak pinto beans overnight and cook until tender. Drain and set aside.
In a blender, combine cooked pinto beans, garlic, diced red pepper, lemon juice, salt, freshly ground black pepper, and enough water to reach desired consistency for marinade.
Marinate the beans in this mixture for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat vegetable oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Add finely chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Stir in the crumbled breadcrumbs, lime juice, and vegan butter/margarine. Cook until well combined and golden brown, stirring frequently to prevent burning.
Spread the pinto bean mixture evenly on a baking dish lined with parchment paper. Pour the breadcrumb mixture over the top.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 20 minutes or until the topping is crisp and golden.
Serve warm as a side dish or appetizer.
